publishedAbstract: We have upgraded from OCS 4.8 to ODF 4.9, but the `odf-operator` csv and subscription are not present. We only see the ones for `ocs-operator` and `mcg-operator`: ~~~ # oc get csv NAME DISPLAY VERSION REPLACES PHASE mcg-operator.v4.9.10 NooBaa Operator 4.9.10 mcg-operator.v4.9.9 Succeeded ocs-operator.v4.9.10 OpenShift Container Storage 4.9.10 ocs-operator.v4.9.9 Succeeded # oc get subscription NAME PACKAGE SOURCE CHANNEL mcg-operator-stable-4.9-redhat-operators-openshift-marketplace mcg-operator redhat-operators stable-4.9 ocs-operator ocs-operator redhat-operators stable-4.9 ~~~ We don't see any new install plan neither for odf-operator ~~~ # oc get installplan NAME CSV APPROVAL APPROVED install-9mwmc ocs-operator.v4.8.11 Automatic true install-gt4pm ocs-operator.v4.9.9 Automatic true install-hcrs9 ocs-operator.v4.9.10 Automatic true install-nvnb9 ocs-operator.v4.8.12 Automatic true install-vd5g9 mcg-operator.v4.9.8 Automatic true ~~~ Ceph status is fine, all pods running (except `odf-console` and `odf-operator-controller-manager`)
publishedTitle: ODF 4.9 - odf-operator csv and subscription are not present
